body.title: Fix hardcoded DB password in seed_boredom_foreman.py
body.result: false positive — file already uses os.environ.get(IGOR_HOME_DB_URL, ...) matching canonical pattern; choose_a_password only appears as fallback default
body.intention: I intend that no production credential strings appear hardcoded in seed_boredom_foreman.py.
body.description:
Audit found `devices/igor/tools/seed_boredom_foreman.py:23` with a hardcoded `choose_a_password` connection string rather than reading from env var. All other callers use `os.environ.get("IGOR_HOME_DB_URL", ...)` — this file is the outlier.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/tools/seed_boredom_foreman.py
**Design rules:** no live keys or passwords in source (CLAUDE.md hard rule)
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace hardcoded URL with env var lookup; OUT — credential management system changes
**Completion criteria:** grep for `choose_a_password` in seed_boredom_foreman.py returns empty; file reads DB URL from IGOR_HOME_DB_URL env var with same default pattern as other callers
